lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪੀ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਈ ਚਲਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: man tan arapee aap gavaaee chalaa satigur bhaae |
lines.english: I offer my mind and body, and I renounce my selfishness and conceit; I walk in Harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sad balihaaree gur apune vittahu ji har setee chit laae |7|
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to my Guru, who has attached my consciousness to the Lord. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜੋ ਬਿੰਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: so braahaman braham jo binde har setee rang raataa |
lines.english: He alone is a Brahmin, who knows the Lord Brahma, and is attuned to the Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਭਨਾ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੈ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh nikatt vasai sabhanaa ghatt antar guramukh viralai jaataa |
lines.english: God is close at hand; He dwells deep within the hearts of all. How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, know Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥੮॥੫॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee gur kai sabad pachhaataa |8|5|22|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Naam, greatness is obtained; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is realized. ||8||5||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੈ ਨੋ ਸਭ ਲੋਚਦੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪਾਇਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahajai no sabh lochadee bin gur paaeaa na jaae |
lines.english: Everyone longs to be centered and balanced, but without the Guru, no one can.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਭੇਟੇ ਸਹਜੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਪਣੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur bhette sehaj paaeaa aapanee kirapaa kare rajaae |1|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, intuitive balance is obtained, when God, in His Will, grants His Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਜੋਤਕੀ ਥਕੇ ਭੇਖੀ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: parr parr panddit jotakee thake bhekhee bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: The Pandits and the astrologers read and read until they grow weary, while the fanatics are deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸਹਜੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai hee te sehaj aoopajai har paaeaa sach soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, intuitive peace and poise wells up, and that True Lord is obtained. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re gur bin sehaj na hoe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, without the Guru, intuitive balance is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਗਾਵਿਆ ਥਾਇ ਪਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਹਜੈ ਕਥਨੀ ਬਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje gaaviaa thaae pavai bin sahajai kathanee baad |
lines.english: That which is sung intuitively is acceptable; without this intuition, all chanting is useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ਬੈਰਾਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje hee bhagat aoopajai sehaj piaar bairaag |
lines.english: In the state of intuitive balance, devotion wells up. In intuitive balance, love is balanced and detached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੈ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਹਜੈ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਬਾਦਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sahajai hee te sukh saat hoe bin sahajai jeevan baad |2|
lines.english: In the state of intuitive balance, peace and tranquility are produced. Without intuitive balance, life is useless. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj saalaahee sadaa sadaa sehaj samaadh lagaae |
lines.english: In the state of intuitive balance, praise the Lord forever and ever. With intuitive ease, embrace Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਗੁਣ ਊਚਰੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje hee gun aoocharai bhagat kare liv laae |
lines.english: In the state of intuitive balance, chant His Glories, lovingly absorbed in devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਖਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabade hee har man vasai rasanaa har ras khaae |3|
lines.english: Through the Shabad, the Lord dwells within the mind, and the tongue tastes the Sublime Essence of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸਚੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje har naam man vasiaa sachee kaar kamaae |
lines.english: Intuitively balanced, the Name of the Lord dwells within the mind, practicing the lifestyle of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਕਾਲੁ ਵਿਡਾਰਿਆ ਸਚ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje kaal viddaariaa sach saranaaee paae |
lines.english: In the poise of intuitive balance, death is destroyed, entering the Sanctuary of the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਊਪਜੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa vich sehaj na aoopajai maaeaa doojai bhaae |
lines.english: Within Maya, the poise of intuitive balance is not produced. Maya leads to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਿਨੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: se vaddabhaagee jinee paaeaa sahaje rahe samaae |4|
lines.english: Those who have found Him are very fortunate; they remain intuitively absorbed in Him. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਚੂਕਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jaman maran na chookee fir fir aavai jaae |5|
lines.english: Their births and deaths do not cease; over and over again, they come and go in reincarnation. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਲੈ ਜਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh karam kamaavane haumai jalai jalaae |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs perform religious rituals, but they are burnt down by their selfishness and conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਗੁਣਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: trihu gunaa vich sehaj na paaeeai trai gun bharam bhulaae |
lines.english: In the three qualities, intuitive balance is not obtained; the three qualities lead to delusion and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜੀਐ ਗੁਣੀਐ ਕਿਆ ਕਥੀਐ ਜਾ ਮੁੰਢਹੁ ਘੁਥਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: parreeai guneeai kiaa katheeai jaa mundtahu ghuthaa jaae |
lines.english: What is the point of reading, studying and debating, if one loses his roots?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੇ ਪਦ ਮਹਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: chauthe pad meh sehaj hai guramukh palai paae |6|
lines.english: In the fourth state, there is intuitive balance; the Gurmukhs gather it in. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: niragun naam nidhaan hai sahaje sojhee hoe |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Formless Lord, is the treasure. Through intuitive balance, understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਹਜੈ ਸਭੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਹੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin sahajai sabh andh hai maaeaa mohu gubaar |
lines.english: Without intuitive balance, all are blind. Emotional attachment to Maya is utter darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਲਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਸੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bhuliaa sehaj milaaeisee sabad milaavaa hoe |7|
lines.english: The wayward are united with God through intuitive balance; through the Shabad, union is obtained. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਆ ਸਚੇ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gunavantee saalaahiaa sache sachee soe |
lines.english: The virtuous praise the True One; their reputation is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਈ ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje hee sojhee pee sachai sabad apaar |
lines.english: In intuitive balance, understanding of the True, Infinite Shabad is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: aape bakhas milaaeian poore gur karataar |8|
lines.english: Granting forgiveness, the Perfect Guru unites us with the Creator. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਇਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa jeea kaa ik daataa jotee jot milaavanahaar |
lines.english: There is only the One Giver of all beings. He blends our light with His Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਅਦਿਸਟੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje adisatt pachhaaneeai nirbhau jot nirankaar |
lines.english: In intuitive balance, the Unseen is recognized-the Fearless, Luminous, Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀਆ ਕਾ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaaneea kaa dhan naam hai sehaj kareh vaapaar |
lines.english: Those who are wise take the Naam as their wealth; with intuitive ease, they trade with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਸ ਦਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: poorai sabad salaaheeai jis daa ant na paaraavaar |9|
lines.english: So praise God through the Perfect Word of His Shabad; He has no end or limitation. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਨਿ ਅਖੁਟ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: anadin laahaa har naam lain akhutt bhare bhanddaar |
lines.english: Night and day, they receive the Profit of the Lord's Name, which is an inexhaustible and over-flowing treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਦੀਏ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰਿ ॥੧੦॥੬॥੨੩॥
lines.translit: naanak tott na aavee dee devanahaar |10|6|23|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Great Giver gives, nothing at all is lacking. ||10||6||23||
